content.en:
Sure enough, just as Ye Tian guessed, when the formation covered the aura here, there would be no source beasts coming here.

Even if some source beasts happened to come here, they left one by one after being blocked by the formation.

Seeing this, Ye Tian breathed a sigh of relief.

He knew that he had kept this Origin Well, otherwise with his strength, he would not be qualified to compete with those powerful Source Emperors and Origin Ancestors.

"This time it's really lucky, there are no Source Emperors and Source Ancestors around here, otherwise, if a Source Emperor appears here in advance, I am not qualified to snatch the Origin Well!"

Ye Tian muttered.

At this time, the Well of Origin had not yet been fully conceived, but only half of it had emerged.

So, Ye Tian sat here cross-legged and waited silently.

Fortunately, there were no Source Beasts to compete with him, so he wasn't worried at all.

Time passed slowly, and two days passed in the blink of an eye.

this day.

With a roar, this ancient well of origin was officially settled on this peak.

Although it had just been conceived, Ye Tian felt the breath of the Origin Well Water, and it was obvious that this Origin Well contained the Origin Well Water, and there were quite a few of them.

Swish!

Ye Tian flew over and immediately entered the Well of Origin.

For Ye Tian's entry, the Well of Origin was not blocked, if the Well of Origin had not really emerged, then Ye Tian would not be able to enter, and there was only one result of forcibly entering - being shocked or annihilated!

"A lot of source well water!"

After Ye Tian entered the Origin Well, he looked at the Origin Well water in the space of this Origin Well, and was immediately stunned.

Compared to the Origin Well contained in the broken Origin Well, there are at least hundreds of times more than that!

Moreover, this is the original well water that has just been bred, and if it takes a long time, it will be even more.

At this time, he truly realized how huge the value of a complete Origin Well was, and it was an unimaginable treasure!

It can even be said that the assets of the human race are not comparable to a well of origin.

"It's a pity that I can't stay in the Origin Realm all the time, otherwise, I will make a lot of money by occupying this Origin Well!"

Ye Tian sighed.

He didn't think much about it, but began to cultivate.

For him, the most important thing in front of him is to improve his strength with the help of the source well water and realize it, and the most important thing is to transform resources into strength.

There is a lot of Origin Well Water in this Origin Well, Ye Tian is not worried about the problem of Origin Well Water at all, and he is relieved to begin to comprehend.

With the assistance of the Origin Well Water, Ye Tian's attainments in the law became more and more profound, and his cultivation in the Chaos Avenue became more and more powerful.

Originally, Ye Tian's Chaos Dao was at the peak of the early stage of the Origin Realm, and now it was progressing at an extremely fast speed, and it was not far from the middle stage of the Origin Realm.

Three months later.

Ye Tian's body appeared with the vision of the ancient well of the Chaos Dao, and the origin in the ancient well suddenly transformed, which also caused the transformation of the ancient well.

I saw that the aura of the ancient well was getting stronger and stronger, and the chaotic rules transmitted were becoming more and more terrifying!

And Ye Tian's aura also changed, as if he had stepped into another level.

Suddenly.

Ye Tian opened his eyes and muttered, "In the middle of the Origin Realm, I finally broke through!"

Before, he had advanced the Origin Realm a little with the help of the damaged Origin Well, not far from the middle of the Origin Realm, and now he had been practicing in this Origin Well for another three months, and he had finally broken the shackles and been promoted to the middle of the Origin Realm.

Don't look at the early stage of the Origin Realm and the middle stage of the Origin Realm, there is only a small level of separation, but the difference between the two is too great.

It can be said that the improvement of the Origin Realm has directly brought Ye Tian's combat power to a new level, and with the strength of the Chaos Dao, Ye Tian is now even able to fight with the weaker Source Emperor, that is, the Tianzun level powerhouse, instead of barely competing with one or two.

"The Chaos Avenue is the strongest avenue, and the Origin Realm of the Chaos Avenue is very difficult to improve, it is very difficult to ascend from the middle of the Origin Realm to the late stage of the Origin Realm, and this Origin Well is estimated to be insufficient. Let's start with the other aspects!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Immediately, he began to comprehend the Wheel of Time, the great power of time.

The Wheel of Time, which was originally at the peak realm of Dacheng, had the assistance of the Origin Well Water, which allowed Ye Tian to make unimaginable progress in the Origin of Time rules, and it was very easy to completely cultivate the Wheel of Time to the consummation realm in just one month.

At this point, Ye Tian had a consummation realm space supernatural power and a consummation realm time supernatural power.

"Messing with the sky, this sword path mastery also needs to be perfected and transformed. I have absorbed so much Origin Well Water, and my understanding of the rules of the Sword is far beyond that of others, and I am improving all the time, and I can definitely perfect the Chaos Knife!"

Ye Tian said confidently.

So, he began to perfect the chaos knife.

Originally, the Mixed Heaven Sword could only be regarded as the top in the supreme sword path mastery, but it was not too rebellious, and many sword path supremes definitely surpassed him in the sword path mastery.

But now, with the help of the Origin Well Water, Ye Tian has improved step by step, making the Chaotian Knife more and more powerful.

Three years later.

Ye Tian stood in the void inside the Well of Origin, holding the knife in his right hand and slashing lightly.

Tear !!

The void tore apart, and a wisp of sword qi slashed above the wall of the Well of Origin, causing the Well of Origin to vibrate.

Although the sword qi did not cut through the Origin Well, its attack power made Ye Tian very satisfied.

"The Chaos Heaven Sword has reached the limit of the Supreme Sword Dao Peerless Learning, even those Dao Supremes who have been enlightened for countless years can hardly surpass me in terms of sword skills!"

This is Ye Tian's self-confidence!

The Chaos Heaven Sword had been perfected, and Ye Tian had temporarily ended his cultivation.

Immediately, he took a look at the source well water.

"I only consume half of the source well water, I can still cultivate for a long time, what should I cultivate next? There is no need to cultivate the Chaos Golden Desolation Technique, the Origin Well Water does not have much auxiliary effect on the Chaos Golden Desolation Technique, and using the Origin Well Water to cultivate the Chaos Golden Desolation Technique is a waste of resources and time. It's better to cultivate the fourth form of Tiangang's battle method!"

Ye Tian suddenly thought.

The fourth form of the Tiangang Battle Method is very difficult to cultivate, and it requires sufficient understanding and sufficient understanding of the rules of the universe, and at the beginning, Ye Tian absorbed a trace of the origin of the universe, so that he could practice the first form of the Tiangang Battle Method as soon as possible.

Now, Ye Tian has a large amount of Origin Well Water, and he may be able to practice the fourth form of Tiangang's Battle Method.

In this way, his strength will skyrocket again!
